projectDescription: A full-stack AI/ML education platform where developers master machine learning concepts through hands-on coding challenges, with an in-browser code editor, automated test execution, and a community leaderboard.
keyFeatures: Hands-on AI/ML coding challenges organized into curated problem sets
In-browser Monaco code editor with Python support
Asynchronous code execution via Upstash QStash and a FastAPI executor service
Real-time submission status polling (Run vs. Submit modes)
Community leaderboard ranked by solved problems
User profiles with activity heatmap and difficulty-breakdown stats
Google OAuth authentication via NextAuth.js v5
Rate limiting on code execution (run: 5/10s, submit: 2/30s) via Upstash Redis
Math rendering in problem descriptions with KaTeX
Resizable split-pane layout (problem statement + editor + console)
publicApiSurface: problemSet.getAll — list all problem sets with problem counts
problemSet.getBySlug — fetch a problem set and its ordered problems
problem.getAll — list all problems with their problem set
problem.getBySlug — fetch a single problem by slug
submission.run — execute code against tests (no DB record, returns runId)
submission.submit — submit code, persists a Submission record, returns submission
submission.getStatus — poll run result from Redis or submission status from DB
user.getLeaderboard — ranked list by unique problems solved (PASS status)
user.getProfile — profile stats: solved counts by difficulty, activity history
feedback.submit — send feedback (general/bug/feature/improvement) to Discord webhook
POST /api/webhooks/process-submission — QStash webhook that calls the FastAPI executor
